title: Marketplace Manager - Mamaearth Capital India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Mamaearth Capital India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Mamaearth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mamaearth Capital India:
Mamaearth Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth Capital India!
